# BUG-003 Writeup
> Generated by [Quality Playbook](https://github.com/andrewstellman/quality-playbook) v1.4.6 — Andrew Stellman
> Date: 2026-04-20 · Project: virtio-1.4.6

## 1. Summary

REQ-004 requires degraded PCI routing to preserve transport queue numbering, but the INTx fallback in `drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_common.c:468-470,499-502` discards `avq->vq_index` and uses `queue_idx++`.

## 2. Why this is a bug

The code asks the device for the advertised admin-queue index, uses that value in the queue name, and then ignores it when programming the queue itself. MSI-X uses the transport-advertised index directly, so the INTx path silently changes queue identity under fallback.

## 3. Regression test

- **Requirement:** REQ-004
- **Test:** `quality/test_regression.py::TestCodeReviewRegressions.test_bug_003_intx_admin_queue_uses_transport_advertised_index`
- **Regression patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-003-regression-test.patch`

## 4. FAIL -> PASS evidence

```text
RED: Command: python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_003_intx_admin_queue_uses_transport_advertised_index
RED: AssertionError: 'vq = vp_setup_vq(vdev, avq->vq_index, vp_modern_avq_done, avq->name,' not found in vp_find_vqs_intx()
GREEN: Command: python3 <temp source patcher BUG-003> && python3 <direct regression assertion runner> test_bug_003_intx_admin_queue_uses_transport_advertised_index
GREEN: test_bug_003_intx_admin_queue_uses_transport_advertised_index: PASS
```

See `quality/results/BUG-003.red.log` and `quality/results/BUG-003.green.log`.

## 5. Challenge gate

`quality/challenge/BUG-003-challenge.md` -> **CONFIRMED**

## 6. The fix

- **Fix patch:** `quality/patches/BUG-003-fix.patch`

```diff
diff --git a/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_common.c b/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_common.c
index 3333333..4444444 100644
--- a/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_common.c
+++ b/drivers/virtio/virtio_pci_common.c
@@ -497,8 +497,8 @@ static int vp_find_vqs_intx(struct virtio_device *vdev, unsigned int nvqs,
 	if (!avq_num)
 		return 0;
 	sprintf(avq->name, "avq.%u", avq->vq_index);
-	vq = vp_setup_vq(vdev, queue_idx++, vp_modern_avq_done, avq->name,
+	vq = vp_setup_vq(vdev, avq->vq_index, vp_modern_avq_done, avq->name,
 			 false, VIRTIO_MSI_NO_VECTOR,
 			 &vp_dev->admin_vq.info);
```
